title: Coin sync hardening — call-deduct DB write fixed
notes: CRITICAL FIX: Call hang-up now persists the correct deducted balance (was overwriting with original at-mount value, undoing all per-minute deductions)
FIX: Wallet purchase now waits for the DB write to succeed before broadcasting — failed payments no longer leave every chip showing a phantom balance
FIX: Removed Wallet's duplicate balance fetch that was racing CallScreen broadcasts (could revive a deducted value)
POLISH: Hook offline-safe — Supabase fetch + write now have proper .catch handlers, no unhandled rejections when offline
Built on top of 2026.0518.0001 — all earlier 13 audit fixes + Edit Post crash patch + coin sync still in this bundle
